item.title: Aussie Olympian Raygun reveals career move into video site for fans after losing Macquarie University job
item.description: The breakdancer is hoping to cash in on her viral fame with a ‘fun’ side hustle.

item.title: ‘End of an era’: Generations mourn closure of iconic nightlife institution in Brisbane
item.description: ‘It’s like part of my youth is dying,’ one patron said.

item.title: Kylie Minogue admits she’s ‘so nervous’ ahead of AFL grand final show
item.description: ‘I don’t know how to prepare myself.’

item.title: Robert Irwin set to secure multimillion-dollar deal after Dancing With The Stars win
item.description: It was announced last month the young conservationist would be returning to the US for his next major career move.

item.title: Married At First Sight UK episodes pulled from streaming as brides allege sexual assault during production
item.description: According to a BBC report, all three women allege the show did not do enough to protect them.

item.title: Colombian singer Shakira wins tax fraud case: Judge orders Spanish government to pay the pop star $100m
item.description: ‘This decision comes after an ordeal that has taken an unacceptable toll.’

item.title: Gold Coast toddler Dusty returns home after near-fatal cake powder accident
item.description: Dusty’s father was involved in a car accident on his way to be with his son.

item.title: Brisbane Heat among several teams keen to play BBL opener in India
item.description: ‘We look forward to further discussions with CA.’

item.title: 'Different beast': Don't write off Wallabies for Cup
item.description: ‘A team shows up on the day, anything can happen.’

item.title: Drama at Collingwood as wannabe thief gets caught taking Scott Pendlebury branded football
item.description: A fan has been taken out in a citizen's arrest after attempting to steal a prized piece of memorabilia.

item.title: Tamika Chesser: Beauty and the Geek star accused of beheading partner faces court after giving birth in custody
item.description: She is accused of brutally killing and beheading her boyfriend.

item.title: Israeli forces intercept Gaza-bound flotilla in the Mediterranean after firing at the vessels
item.description: Video streamed live from the flotilla showed soldiers firing shots at two of the boats.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz wiped out of another grand slam as world No.2 withdraws from Wimbledon
item.description: The world No.2 ‘will be missed’ as the tennis world waits to see if anyone else can challenge Jannik Sinner.

item.title: Writings of teen shooters reveal motivations for deadly San Diego Mosque attack
item.description: The ‘radicalised’ pair fatally shot three people before taking their own lives.

item.title: Carlton quietly settle with former list boss Nick Austin after five-minute ‘blindside’
item.description: The Blues bounced back on the field and now they’ve made another move after what wasn’t ‘a great week’ for the club.

item.title: US President Donald Trump shielded from future tax investigations into sons and businesses under explosive deal
item.description: ‘A get-out-of-jail-free card negotiated with himself.’

item.title: ‘I’m overcome’: Stolen war medals reunited with Brisbane family after nine years
item.description: ‘I never ever thought I’d ever see these again at all.’

item.title: Sydney girl with alopecia gets life-changing gift from generous strangers
item.description: Azaliah was too scared to go to school after losing her hair but that has all changed.

item.title: Netanyahu scolds Israeli minister for releasing videos taunting detained flotilla activists
item.description: World leaders have condemned the treatment of the detainees, labelling the incident ‘way out of line’ and ‘inadmissible’.

item.title: Socceroos star Riley McGree gets final shot at EPL as rivals lose $376m ‘Spygate’ appeal
item.description: The 27-year-old will play in the biggest game of his career just days before jetting off for the World Cup.

item.title: Bianca Adler, 18, becomes youngest Australian to summit Everest after second attempt
item.description: Bianca Adler is the youngest Australian to climb to the top of the world after summiting on her second attempt.

item.description: ‘Flemington will not be the same without seeing his smiling face each morning.’

item.title: Football Australia's record losses top $15 million
item.description: ‘It is obviously not a situation that is sustainable or acceptable.’

item.title: AFLW fixture to take strong ‘step forward’ on men’s grand final weekend
item.description: The league is hoping to cash in on Victoria’s public holiday.

item.title: TV star Dr Chris Brown shares loved-up photos with partner Lorraine Monforte
item.description: The vet turned Dancing With The Stars host has fans swooning.

item.title: Queen was 'very keen' for former prince Andrew to become UK trade envoy, documents reveal
item.description: The UK government has released a trove of confidential documents on ‌the hiring process.

item.title: Ebola case confirmed in rebel-held area of Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: It signals the spread of an outbreak experts believe has circulated for months.

item.description: The rising star has been dealt the worst possible outcome for her Roland Garros debut.

item.description: Tributes are flowing after the popular racer was hospitalised and died days before one of the biggest races of the year.

item.description: The Aussie star has been out of sorts recently but is finally starting to show glimpses of his very best.

item.title: Australians among hundreds of Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel amid detention video backlash
item.description: Israel has been accused of torturing, humiliating and unlawfully detaining peaceful activists.

item.description: Entrepreneurial Aussies are being urged to take their business elsewhere ahead of major budget changes.

item.description: Doctors are struggling to contain the health crisis.

item.description: The Australian has found himself in the middle of what would be a monster shake-up to Formula 1.

item.description: ‘I sobbed for hours.’

item.description: The 55-year-old, who has died days before the French Open, became ‘part of the fabric of tennis’ during the Swiss great’s career.

item.title: ‘Horrendous’ update as veteran jockey Shane McGovern moved to palliative care
item.description: Doctors performed a third amputation before the ‘sad situation’ moved the family towards a difficult decision.

item.description: The mother-of-two was accused of trying to avoid the inconvenience of office-based work.

item.description: ‘There is still a long way to go.’

item.description: In 2022, the group went on hiatus as the members pursued solo projects and completed mandatory military service.

item.title: Former prince Andrew’s police investigation now assessing ‘sexual’ claims
item.description: The disgraced royal was arrested in February for suspicion of misconduct in public office.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez to close eight Chicago restaurants after failing to crack US market
item.description: Shares in an Aussie-born Mexican fast-food chain have surged after it pulled the pin on an attempt to crack a competitive market.

item.description: ‘No one wants to have to kill horses but there are still too many in Kosciuszko National Park.’

item.description: Katie Price claims the 43-year-old was ‘captured’ in a van while attempting to board a flight to the UK.

item.description: An agricultural expert has issued a dire warning as a critical waterway remains closed.

item.description: Those closest the 38-year-old say he had two great loves — the ocean and his family.

item.description: Shona Manderson has revealed she is facing ‘blame and judgement’ after speaking publicly.

item.title: Final group of ‘ISIS brides’ and children set to return to Australia from Syria
item.description: The seven women and 14 children are currently making the dangerous journey to Syria’s capital.

item.title: Holidaymakers in despair amid cancellation chaos with Aussie travel company under investigation
item.description: The organiser of a $60,000 girls’ trip said she was told ‘if you keep asking, you won’t get your refund’.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 2026 Ford Everest price and specs: MY26.5 updates detailed – UPDATE
item.description: A less powerful four-cylinder diesel engine opens a rejigged Ford Everest lineup for model year 2026.5, but you can still get the popular V6.

item.title: US President Trump says agreement with Iran has ‘been largely negotiated’ and Strait of Hormuz will be opened
item.description: He said the peace deal with Iran is now ‘subject to finalisation’.

item.title: This new-car trend needs to stop before someone gets hurt
item.description: After more than half a century of relatively standardised controls, car companies are messing with the formula – and they had better knock it off!

item.title: 2026 Ford Ranger price and specs: MY26.5 updates detailed – UPDATE
item.description: A reshuffled Ford Ranger lineup sees the Bi-Turbo engine and Sport trims dropped, but two new model grades and wider V6 availability.

item.title: Suspect dead, bystander fighting for life after gunshots ring out near the White House
item.description: US President Donald Trump was inside the White House at the time.

item.title: Family of Kyle Busch reveals two-time NASCAR champion’s cause of death
item.description: The 41-year-old was struck down by a severe condition that quickly progressed into something lethal.

item.title: Ebola clinic tent by Doctors Without Borders set ablaze in Congo with 18 leaving amid virus outbreak
item.description: Angry residents set fire to the tent, causing 18 people suspected of the infection to leave.

item.title: Riley McGree’s World Cup hopes in danger after limping off in Championship playoff final
item.description: One of Australia’s most creative and explosive players is in a race against time.

item.title: Localised Optus outage hits SA town for several hours
item.description: Police say an equipment fault is behind the latest disruption, with Optus technicians fixing it about 12pm.

item.title: Scans confirm ACL rupture for Jamie Elliott as Nick Daicos cleared after surprise setback
item.description: Cameras waiting for Jamie Elliott and Darcy Moore weren’t expecting to see Nick Daicos walk in to get a scan.

item.title: Virgin River star Stewart McLean found dead after going missing, friend reveals warning sign before his death
item.description: An actor has been found dead days after he went missing, with police suspecting the star was murdered.

item.title: Cam Munster fails to train as Maroons scoff at suggestion of ‘mind games’
item.description: ‘That’s them doing most of the talking.’

item.title: Gold Coast room fire critically injures woman with infant hospitalised
item.description: A woman in her 30s suffered life-threatening burns to her body.

item.title: Brisbane ‘witches hats’ shellshocked as GWS record highest-scoring third quarter in VFL/AFL history
item.description: ‘What we’re seeing from Brisbane is just horrifying.’

item.title: Paul Simon bemoans Elvis Presley 'wasting his great talent'
item.description: 'Really, by ‘57, I’d lost interest in Elvis Presley.’

item.title: Albanese Government dodges questions on reports authorities failed to flag Bondi gunmen’s terror trips
item.description: The Albanese Government has dodged questions on reports of a communication breakdown between national security agencies, amid claims warning signs about the accused Bondi terrorists were not properly shared.

item.title: ‘Unnecessary tragedy’: Bob Katter blasts shark laws after fatal Far North Queensland attack
item.description: Bob Katter says rising numbers are ‘out of control’ following the death of a 39-year-old man.

item.title: Childhood dream slips through Harvey Langford’s hands as Joel Freijah proves the match-winner
item.description: Harvey Langford had a chance to be the match-winner with just seconds remaining on the clock.

item.title: Men killed in Sans Souci crash remembered as community raises funds
item.description: Crucial questions remain about what happened in the 10 minutes before tragedy struck.

item.title: Teen worker held at knifepoint in Chinese restaurant on NSW Central Coast before off-duty guards stabbed in heroic rescue
item.description: ‘They were heroic in their efforts.’

item.title: 7NEWS Spotlight: Olympian Libby Trickett sounds alarm after near death experience
item.description: ‘The amount of families destroyed because a woman has this catastrophic event is more than I can bear.’

item.title: Russia uses hypersonic Oreshnik missile in mass attack on Ukrainian capital Kyiv
item.description: Vladimir Putin says several such missiles, even with conventional warheads, could be as devastating as a nuclear strike.

item.title: Former Game of Thrones star Hannah Murray recalls being drawn into a wellness cult
item.description: ‘I made terrible choices.’

item.title: Police across Australia to use world-first virtual reality training for family violence callouts
item.description: Police respond to a family violence incident every two minutes.

item.title: China sending astronaut on year-long space mission
item.description: The race to return a human to the moon is heating up as pressure mounts on China to meet its 2030 deadline.
